heading: Office of Non-Public Education
label: 3423b Office of Non-Public Education
text: There shall be in the Department an Office of Non-Public Education to ensure the maximum potential participation of non-public school students in all Federal educational programs for which such students are eligible.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 212 and is classified to .section 214 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3423a of this titleAnother prior was renumbered section 217 and is classified to .section 214 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3424 of this title
